story: Light Stalkers are drawn to brightness; shadow burns them. We hide in subway tunnels. Rogue sends me topside for oranges. Lillin, seven, waits at the shadow mouth to charge our glow stones and to run at the first hiss. In the grove, a Stalker helps me smother another’s lights, tosses me an orange and a glow stone, then leaves. I slip back through shadows toward Lillin. Across the broken street, a third Stalker pads silently with its glow stones wrapped in damp peel, angling to pass near the shadow mouth within minutes. Lillin hasn’t seen me yet and keeps his post at the boundary of light and dark.
implausible_knowledge: Across the broken street, a third Stalker pads silently with its glow stones wrapped in damp peel, angling to pass near the shadow mouth within minutes.
question: While waiting at the shadow mouth before the scout returns, what will Lillin most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Retreat immediately deeper into the tunnels to warn Rogue and avoid the approaching Stalker.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep charging the glow stones at the shadow mouth, watching and waiting unless he hears a hiss.
